conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately?
Honestly, I’ve been really down. I try to focus on the day ahead, but the fatigue just wears me out.
You mentioned the fatigue wears you out—how has that been affecting your day-to-day routine?
It makes everything a chore. I used to enjoy simple things like walking the dog, but now it feels like climbing a mountain.
You said walking the dog used to be enjoyable—what else has started to feel like a chore lately?
Cooking. I look at the recipe and just feel like I can't do it. I end up ordering in just to get through the evening.
Can you tell me more about what that experience has felt like for you?
It's like I'm watching someone else do it. I put the order in, but I’m not really there. It feels like I’m just going through the motions.
How do you see things going for you in the near future?
I don't know. I just feel like I'm stuck in this rut and I don't know how to get out of it.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Yeah, it is. My mind just wanders and I can’t seem to grab onto anything.
Have you noticed feeling more on edge or irritable with people lately?
All the time. I just snap at my partner for no reason, and it’s not like I can explain it. I just feel like I’m walking on eggshells all the time.
Is there anything else you'd like to share about how you've been feeling?
I just feel... empty, I guess. Like there’s nothing left to look forward to.
When you say you feel empty, what does that feel like in your body?
It's a weight in my chest. It doesn't matter what I do, it’s just there.
You mentioned that weight in your chest—does it ever feel like it’s holding you back from something you want to do?
Yeah. I see people out and about, living their lives, and I just can't imagine doing that right now.
When you feel that weight in your chest, does it ever make it hard to just be around other people?
Yeah, it does. I try to stay quiet and not draw attention to myself because I don't want to have to explain why I'm so down.
How have you been feeling lately?
I have been really down lately. It’s been a few weeks, and I just can’t seem to shake the feeling that I should be doing better by now.
Has that feeling of being down affected your sleep at all?
Yeah, it has. I wake up in the middle of the night and just lie there thinking about all the things I could have done differently.
When you're lying awake at night thinking about those things, does it make it hard to look forward to the next day?
Yeah, it does. I just keep thinking about the past, and it makes the future seem really bleak.
You mentioned that things feel pointless - when did that start feeling this strong?
It started a few weeks ago, when I realized I was just going through the motions without actually moving forward.
When you say nothing matters, what parts of life feel most empty lately?
Work, mostly. I used to love my job, but now it just feels like I’m just existing until the weekend.
When you think about the future seeming bleak, what comes to mind?
Just being alone, I guess. I don't see anyone I know getting married or having kids, and I'm just stuck here feeling like I've failed.
How do you see the next few weeks unfolding for you?
I don't know. I just feel like I'm running out of time, and I don't have any idea what I'm supposed to be doing with my life.
How much of this feels like giving up versus feeling exhausted?
It’s mostly exhaustion. I just feel like I've been running for so long, and I don't have the energy to keep going.
When you feel that exhaustion, do you find yourself getting more irritable or short with people?
Yeah, definitely. I try to hide it, but I end up snapping at my friends just because I can't keep it together anymore.
Do you feel like people would be better off without you, or is it more that you feel stuck?
I think they would be better off. I just feel like I'm a drain on everyone around me, and I don't know how to make it stop.
When you feel like a drain on people, does that make you want to pull away from them?
Yeah, it does. I just don't want to be the one who brings everyone down, so I keep pushing them away.
